headline: Glenveagh backs 2026 guidance as "efficiency gains" provide cover
summary: Glenveagh Properties PLC on Friday provided an optimistic trading update ahead of its annual general meeting. The Kildare, Ireland-based housebuilder said it had strong visibility for the remainder...
